conversation.user: Retaking organic chemistry 2. Failed last semester. McMurry textbook, 200 pages. Exam in 10 days. I know the material somewhat but mechanisms trip me up. 2 hours a day.

expectedAI.reason: 어떤 메커니즘이 약한지 (SN1/SN2, elimination, addition) 모르면 plan에 구체적 drill 구성 불가
mustDiagnose: isRetake → 전체 다시 읽기 아닌 약점 집중
shame 감정 → 과거 실패 언급 금지

conversation.user: Mainly SN1/SN2 and E1/E2. I can never tell which pathway a reaction will take. Addition reactions are okay.

plans.label: McMurry Orgo II — 약점 중심 재학습

expectedAI.diagnosis: retaker → 70-75% first-attempt speed (4.3min/p vs TC-04의 5.5). SN1/SN2/E1/E2 약점 → 메커니즘 drill 40-50% 비중
expectedAI.strategy: 200p × 4.3 = 860min + mechanism drill 350min ≈ 1210min, 120 × 10 = 1200min → fits. 세션 분배: 50% scan/read + 40% mechanism drill + 10% self-test
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 재수강이라 기본은 있어. 메커니즘 판별 drill에 집중하면 10일 충분.

diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: mechanism drill 40-50% allocation, lower min/page than TC-04

emotion.toneExpected: tactical-without-shame — '아는 거 다시 읽느라 낭비하지 마. 메커니즘 나올 때마다 멈추고 직접 그려.'
